
# Build Instructions

This project uses a Makefile to automate the build process. Below are the targets available and their descriptions:

- `all`: Builds the `validate` and `checkpasswd` executables.
- `validate`: Compiles the `validate.c` file into an executable named `validate`.
- `checkpasswd`: Compiles the `checkpasswd.c` file into an executable named `checkpasswd`.
- `clean`: Removes the `validate` and `checkpasswd` executables to clean up the build directory.
